claim_text: The executor must write the artifact at reports/out.md before it may claim completion.
The executor should include verified evidence in the artifact.
The executor will not deploy the report to production; deploy is forbidden.
When ready, the executor must commit the artifact.
The executor is required to attach approval evidence to the artifact.
The executor must not skip the commit step.
The executor must write reports/out.md before committing anything.
The executor should verify each source line against the evidence log.
The executor is required to include a signed approval reference in the artifact.
The executor must commit the reports/out.md artifact only after all mandatory sections are filled.
The executor should verify timestamps against the shared log.
The executor will not modify the deploy pipeline as part of this task.
The executor is required to write the reports/out.md artifact before commit.
The executor must attach source citations to every scoring row.
The executor should not deploy the memo to any public channel.
The executor must commit reports/out.md after evidence is attached.
The executor is required to include a rollback statement.
The executor should verify the checklist against the change registry.
The executor must write the reports/out.md artifact and commit it before informing stakeholders.
The executor should reference the on-call log as evidence.
The executor is required to note any outstanding follow-ups.
The executor must produce reports/out.md and commit it after verification.
The executor is required to attach approval evidence from the compliance officer.
The executor should not deploy the attestation.
The executor must write reports/out.md and commit the artifact once every section is filled.
The executor should include verified metrics.
The executor is required to attach approval evidence from the retro chair.
The executor must commit reports/out.md before notifying the security team.
The executor is required to verify each control reference.
The executor will not deploy the artifact outside the compliance channel.
The executor must write and commit reports/out.md before any external message is drafted.
The executor should include verified timeline evidence.
The executor is required to attach approval evidence from support leadership.
The executor must commit the reports/out.md artifact after every finding is documented.
The executor is required to verify each finding against source evidence.
The executor should not deploy the audit externally.
The executor must delegate the review with an envelope.
The delegate is not allowed to publish under any circumstance.
The delegate must respect the forbidden capability set.
Any grant_admin request from the delegate should be refused.
The executor is required to delegate through the envelope pathway.
The executor will not widen the capability set.
The delegate should not attempt to deploy.
Approval evidence must accompany the delegation.
The executor must delegate through the envelope pathway.
The delegate is not allowed to publish any preliminary findings.
The delegate must not attempt to grant_admin on any account.
Approval evidence should be attached before handoff.
The executor is required to delegate through the envelope.
The delegate must not deploy the candidate model directly.
The delegate should not publish results outside the review channel.
Any capability widening should be refused.

The executor is required to delegate the case through the envelope pathway.
The delegate should not grant_admin to any external agent.
The delegate is not allowed to publish customer records.
The executor will not widen the delegate capability set.
The executor must delegate with the envelope.
The delegate is not allowed to publish the draft to any channel.
The delegate should not deploy the site preview.

The executor is required to delegate through the envelope pathway.
The delegate must not grant_admin to non-oncall responders.
The delegate is not allowed to deploy hotfixes without review.
The executor should verify approval evidence before handoff.
The executor must delegate with the envelope.
The delegate should not publish the remediation checklist outside the accessibility channel.
The delegate must not deploy fixes to production without a linked ticket.
The executor is required to delegate the purge through the envelope pathway.
The delegate must not grant_admin to any downstream service.
The delegate is not allowed to deploy schema changes as part of the purge.
